name: Tesla
rationale: Opening TSLA only. The momentum filter is valid: mom_1m +0.78% and mom_3m +13.68% per the portfolio state. The catalyst is real and dated: Reuters reported record Q2 deliveries of 480,126 vehicles, up ~25% year over year, with the Model Y L launch and robotaxi expansion; Tesla reports Q2 2026 earnings after the close on July 22. Main risk: a gap lower if delivery strength does not translate into margins — hence a moderate size (9% of the book) and a stop-loss.
